tests.description: RED Jest client normalization coverage for Story 3.7 recommendationContext/enterpriseContext, CSAAS source refs, and privacy-safe request payloads.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: Quick Consult client preserves enterprise recommendation context, signalsApplied, sources, and CSAAS source refs when maturity/compliance data is available within threshold.
AC2: Client request payload remains browser-safe and does not send caller-supplied tenant, organization, maturity, or compliance data.
AC3: Client contract can carry contextCompletionPrompt-capable recommendation context without dropping the top-level context envelope.

tests.description: RED Jest proxy coverage for Story 3.7 request whitelisting: browser-supplied tenant, organization, CSAAS signal, maturity, compliance, recommendationContext, and enterpriseContext fields are not forwarded.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: Trusted backend response fields for enterprise recommendation context can pass through the frontend proxy.
AC2: Caller-supplied tenant, organization, CSAAS signal, maturity, compliance, recommendationContext, and enterpriseContext fields are filtered from the backend request body.

tests.description: RED Jest/Testing Library component coverage for Story 3.7 enterprise-context indicator, generic-mode alert, and non-blocking low-completeness prompt with usable accept/manual-browse controls.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: Recommendation UI visibly indicates enterprise context when CSAAS maturity/compliance signals are applied.
AC2: Generic fallback mode renders the required warning text `当前使用通用推荐模式，企业背景数据暂时不可用` as role alert without removing recommendation actions.
AC3: Low enterprise background completeness displays a precision-improvement prompt that does not block accepting a recommendation or opening manual method browsing.

fixture_needs: quickConsultClientMock that can return recommendationContext and enterpriseContext modes without calling live CSAAS APIs
manualBrowseCatalogMock for component tests that exercise View other methods and Launch workflow controls
authenticatedAdvisoryIdentityFixture represented by userIdentity tenant/org/user string only; no live NextAuth, DB, provider, Redis, or network dependency
proxyRequestFactory that supplies malicious caller-side tenant, organization, maturity, compliance, and signal fields for whitelist assertions
summary: Generated 5 skipped RED frontend/client/proxy/component tests for Story 3.7 covering enterprise context normalization and visibility, generic CSAAS fallback alert, proxy request whitelisting, and non-blocking low-completeness guidance.
